name: adsd
description: ADSD methodology for managing multi-agent software projects where AI agents produce most of the code. Provides 4-tier role topology (P10 CTO / P9 tech lead / P7 senior eng / P0 atomic + external review), two-phase dispatch SOP (Phase 1 ADR spike then Phase 2 P9 impl), 8-dimension audit pattern (4 internal + 3 persona + deep-source-read), F1-F18 failure-modes catalogue, AI velocity planning heuristic, and ADR/finding/snapshot/dispatch-prompt/handoff-cover-letter templates.
